message:
test(readme): integration test for Replacement section (fd90.184 / br-y01i5)

Adds readme_conditional_logic_compiles_and_runs covering the four
APIs documented in README "Replacement" (lines 1077-1102):
- DataFrame.replace(&[(from, to)]) for sentinel cleanup
- StringAccessor.replace_regex for regex masking
- Series.map_with_na_action for dictionary-style mapping
- Series.case_when for conditional grade assignment

The case_when block was just simplified in fd90.183 to use the new
From<&str> for Scalar ergonomics; this regression test prevents
future signature drift on that documented surface.

Test exercises the same .into() pattern shown in the README so that
README and integration test stay co-evolved.

Verified: 23 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
